scripts.test: cross-env TEST_ENV=local BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --tags "not @skip" --profile chromium Features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:headed: cross-env TEST_ENV=local HEADED=true BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --tags "not @skip" Features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:sites: cross-env TEST_ENV=local HEADED=true BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --tags "not @skip" Features/Site-Configuration.feature
scripts.test:all-browsers: npm run test:chromium && npm run test:firefox && npm run test:webkit
scripts.clean:artifacts: rimraf all-results/ intermediate-results/ test-results/ reports/ cucumber-report-chromium.html auth-setup-failure-local.png
scripts.test:login: cross-env TEST_ENV=local BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --profile chromium --parallel 1 --tags "not @skip" --format json:reports/login-report.json Features/Login-Authentication.feature
scripts.test:screens: cross-env TEST_ENV=local BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --profile chromium --tags "not @skip and not @login and not @stage" --format json:reports/screens-report.json Features/**/*.feature  --parallel 4
scripts.test:passes: cross-env TEST_ENV=local BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --profile chromium --tags "not @skip and not @login" --format json:reports/passes-report.json Features/Passes-Management.feature
scripts.test:login-stage: cross-env TEST_ENV=stage BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --profile chromium --parallel 1 --tags "not @skip" --format json:reports/login-report.json Features/Login-Authentication.feature
scripts.test:screens-stage: cross-env TEST_ENV=stage BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --profile chromium --tags "not @skip and not @login and not @local" --format json:reports/screens-report.json Features/**/*.feature  --parallel 4
scripts.test:local: cross-env TEST_ENV=local BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --tags "not @skip" --profile chromium Features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:local:firefox: cross-env TEST_ENV=local BROWSER=firefox cucumber-js --tags "not @skip" --profile firefox Features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:local:webkit: cross-env TEST_ENV=local BROWSER=webkit cucumber-js --tags "not @skip" --profile webkit Features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:local:all: npm run test:local && npm run test:local:firefox && npm run test:local:webkit
scripts.test:local:headed: cross-env TEST_ENV=local HEADED=true BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --tags "not @skip" Features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:stage: cross-env TEST_ENV=stage BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --tags "not @skip" --profile chromium Features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:stage:firefox: cross-env TEST_ENV=stage BROWSER=firefox cucumber-js --tags "not @skip" --profile firefox Features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:stage:webkit: cross-env TEST_ENV=stage BROWSER=webkit cucumber-js --tags "not @skip" --profile webkit Features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:stage:all: npm run test:stage && npm run test:stage:firefox && npm run test:stage:webkit
scripts.test:stage:headed: cross-env TEST_ENV=stage HEADED=true BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --tags "not @skip" Features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:production: cross-env TEST_ENV=production BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --tags "not @skip and not @destructive" --profile chromium Features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:production:firefox: cross-env TEST_ENV=production BROWSER=firefox cucumber-js --tags "not @skip and not @destructive" --profile firefox Features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:production:webkit: cross-env TEST_ENV=production BROWSER=webkit cucumber-js --tags "not @skip and not @destructive" --profile webkit Features/**/*.feature
scripts.test:production:all: npm run test:production && npm run test:production:firefox && npm run test:production:webkit
scripts.test:Dashboard: cross-env TEST_ENV=local HEADED=true BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js --tags "not @skip" --profile chromium --parallel 1 Features/BI-Dashboards.feature
scripts.test:multi: cross-env  TEST_ENV=local BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js Features/Company-Profiles.feature Features/Truck-List.feature Features/Truck-Permit.feature --tags "not @skip" --profile chromium --parallel 1
scripts.test:Parameters: cross-env  TEST_ENV=local BROWSER=chromium cucumber-js Features/System-Parameters.feature --tags "not @skip" --profile chromium --parallel 1
scripts.test:report: npm run test:convert && allure generate --clean -o allure-report
scripts.test:full-enhanced: npm run test:all-browsers && npm run test:convert && npm run test:dashboard
scripts.test:full: npm run test || npm run report:analyze
scripts.debug: cross-env TEST_ENV=local HEADED=true BROWSER=chromium PWDEBUG=1 npx cucumber-js --tags "@debug and @company-profiles" Features/Company-Profiles.feature
